name: Students for the Exploration and Development of Space (UB SEDS)
relevance_department: School of Engineering and Applied Sciences (SEAS)
relevance_explanation: A student-led organization that raises interest in space exploration through projects in rocketry, high-altitude balloons, and astronomy.

name: University at Buffalo Nanosatellite Laboratory (UB Nanosat)
relevance_explanation: A collaborative lab that designs, builds, and launches small satellites (cubesats) in partnership with NASA and the Air Force Research Laboratory (AFRL).

name: UB Space Bulls
relevance_department: School of Engineering and Applied Sciences (SEAS)
relevance_explanation: A multidisciplinary team that designs and builds planetary rovers for international competitions such as the University Rover Challenge (URC).

name: American Institute of Aeronautics and Astronautics (AIAA) UB Student Chapter
relevance_explanation: The student chapter of the national aerospace professional society, providing professional development and aerospace-related design projects.

name: UB Robotics (UBR)
relevance_department: School of Engineering and Applied Sciences (SEAS)
relevance_explanation: An undergraduate club focused on engineering excellence in robotics, working on projects including autonomous land vehicles and AI.

name: UB Drone Club
relevance_department: School of Engineering and Applied Sciences (SEAS)
relevance_explanation: A club where students learn to fly and build drones, utilizing the SOAR facility for UAV research.

name: Advanced Navigation and Control Systems (ANCS) Laboratory
relevance_explanation: Conducts research in attitude estimation, nonlinear filtering, and space systems. Known for developing the UB NanoSat satellite.

name: Center for Multisource Information Fusion (CMIF)
relevance_department: School of Engineering and Applied Sciences (SEAS)
relevance_explanation: A center dedicated to information fusion research, with a major focus on tracking and monitoring space debris.

name: Planetary Science Group
relevance_explanation: Investigates geologic processes on other planets, such as volcanism on Mars, Venus, and the Moon.

name: Computational Energy Transport (CET) Lab
relevance_explanation: Focuses on numerical modeling and simulation of energy transfer in reacting flows, relevant to propulsion systems.

name: Center for Embodied Autonomy and Robotics (CEAR)
relevance_department: School of Engineering and Applied Sciences (SEAS)
relevance_explanation: A multidisciplinary center that fosters research in robotics and autonomous systems.

name: Women of Aeronautics & Astronautics (WoAA) UB Student Chapter
relevance_department: School of Engineering and Applied Sciences (SEAS)
relevance_explanation: An organization dedicated to supporting and increasing the participation of women in aeronautics and astronautics.

name: University at Buffalo Pilots Association
relevance_department: School of Engineering and Applied Sciences (SEAS)
relevance_explanation: Promotes interest in aviation through private pilot training resources and flight simulations.

name: Physics and Astronomy Student Association (PASA)
relevance_explanation: Supports students interested in physics and astronomy, providing community and academic support.

name: Distributed RObotics and Networked Embedded Sensing (DRONES) Lab
relevance_explanation: Develops algorithms for coordinated robotic systems, applicable to swarms of UAVs.

name: Adaptive Design Algorithms, Models & Systems (ADAMS) Lab
relevance_explanation: Researches swarm robotics, human-swarm interaction, and bio-inspired flow modulation for UAVs.

name: Control, Dynamics and Estimation (CoDE) Laboratory
relevance_explanation: Focuses on modeling and control of dynamical systems with applications in aerospace control.

name: Sound and Vibrations Laboratory (SVL)
relevance_explanation: Researches smart materials for optimization of systems like adaptive aerospace structures.

name: Composite Materials Research Laboratory
relevance_explanation: Develops advanced composites used in aerospace and industrial applications.

name: Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering Student Community (MAESC)
relevance_explanation: Provides academic and professional support for students in the MAE department.

name: Sustainable Manufacturing and Advanced Robotic Technologies (SMART)
relevance_department: School of Engineering and Applied Sciences (SEAS)
relevance_explanation: Focuses on advanced manufacturing and robotics, including automated systems.

name: High Energy Physics and Cosmology Group
relevance_explanation: Conducts theoretical research in cosmology and the early universe.

name: Catipovic Observation Project
relevance_explanation: An astronomy project and observation facility at the University at Buffalo North Campus.
